mermaidSyntax:
sequenceDiagram
  participant A as Author
  participant E as Editor
  participant R1 as Reviewer 1
  participant R2 as Reviewer 2
  participant P as Production

  A->>E: Submit Manuscript
  E->>E: Desk Review
  
  alt Desk Reject
    E-->>A: Reject (End)
  else Send for Peer Review
    par Assign Reviewers
      E->>R1: Review Request
      E->>R2: Review Request
    end
    
    par Submit Reports
      R1-->>E: Report (2-4 weeks)
      R2-->>E: Report (2-4 weeks)
    end
    
    E->>E: Evaluate Reports
    
    alt Accept
      E-->>A: Accept
      E->>P: Forward Manuscript
    else Minor Revisions
      E-->>A: Minor Revisions
      Note over A,E: Author revises and resubmits
      A->>E: Resubmit
    else Major Revisions
      E-->>A: Major Revisions
      Note over A,E: Author revises and resubmits
      A->>E: Resubmit
    else Reject
      E-->>A: Reject (End)
    end
    
    P->>P: Copyediting
    P->>P: Typesetting
    P->>A: Send Proofs
    A->>P: Approve Proofs
    P->>P: Publish Article
  end
